title: AnalyticsDashboard - Metadata API

analyticsWorkspace.description: The Tableau Next workspace the dashboard belongs to.

lastDraftModifiedDate.description: The date the dashboard draft was last modified.

lastPublishedDate.description: The date the dashboard was last published.

layouts.description: The layouts for the dashboard. A dashboard has 0 or more layouts.

style.description: The style of the dashboard. This is a JSON string. Example: {"widgetStyle":{"backgroundColor":"#ffffff","borderEdges":[],"borderColor":"#cccccc","borderWidth":1,"borderRadius":0}}

templateAssetSourceName.description: If the dashboard was created from a template, the name of the source dashboard in the template.

templateSource.description: If the dashboard was created from a template, the name of the source template.

version.description: The API version of the dashboard.

widgets.description: A list of widgets in the dashboard. A dashboard has 0 or more widgets.

workspaceAssetRelationships.description: A list of analytics assets in the workspace this dashboard is associated with. A dashboard has 0 or more workspace asset relationships.

analyticsDashboard.description: The name of the dashboard the layout is associated with.

analyticsDashboardVersion.description: The version of the dashboard the layout is associated with.

columnCount.description: The number of columns in the layout.

maxWidth.description: The max width of the layout, in pixels.

pages.description: The pages to display for this dashboard layout. A layout has 0 or more pages.

rowHeight.description: The row height for layout rows.

style.description: The style for the layout. This is a JSON string. Example: {"backgroundColor":"#ffffff","gutterColor":"#f3f3f3","cellSpacingX":8,"cellSpacingY":8

version.description: The API version of the dashboard layout.

index.description: The index of the page in the dashboard. An index of 0 is the first page of the dashboard. No index is required if there is only the default page of the dashboard.

label.description: The label for the dashboard page.

pageName.description: The generated unique ID for the dashboard page.

pageWidgets.description: A list of dashboard page widgets. A page has 0 or more page widgets.

analyticsDashboardWidget.description: The name of dashboard widget, defined in the list of widgets for the dashboard.

colspan.description: The column span for the widget on the page. This is a numeric value.

column.description: The column the widget is placed in on the page. This is a numeric value.

row.description: The row the widget is placed in on the page. This is a numeric value.

rowspan.description: The row span for the widget on the page. This is a numeric value.

analyticsDashboard.description: The API name of the dashboard the widget is associated with.

buttonWidgetDefs.description: The definition for a button widget type. A dashboard has 0 or more button widgets. Required for button widget.

containerWidgetDefs.description: The definition for a container widget type. A dashboard has 0 or more container widgets. Required for container widget.

dynamicTokens.description: The definition for a dynamic widget token. A dashboard has 0 or more dynamic tokens.

filterWidgetDefs.description: The definition for a filter widget type. A dashboard has 0 or more filter widgets. Required for filter widget.

imageWidgetDefs.description: The definition for a image widget type. A dashboard has 0 or more image widgets. Required for image widget.

metricWidgetDefs.description: The definition for a metric widget type. A dashboard has 0 or more metric widgets. Required for metric widget.

parameterWidgetDefs.description: The definition for a parameter widget type. A dashboard has 0 or more paramet widgets. Required for parameter widget.

textWidgetDefs.description: The definition for a text widget type. A dashboard has 0 or more text widgets. Required for text widget.

type.description: The widget type.Values are: button container extension filter image metric parameter text summary visualization

vizWidgetDefs.description: The definition for a visualization widget type. A dashboard has 0 or more visualization widgets. Required for visualization widget.

widgetActions.description: The actions for the widget. A widget has 0 or more text widgets.

widgetName.description: The API name of the widget. Use this for the analyticsDashboardWidget value in AnalyticsDashPageWidget.

actionType.description: The action type. Values are: flow navigate parameter recordaction

analyticsAssetVerson.description: The version of the Analytics asset the action is associated with.

eventType.description: The action event type. Values are: click select

parameters.description: The parameter for the action. This is a JSON string. Example: {"destination":{"type":"url","target":"www.salesforce.com"}}

version.description: The API version of the action.

parameters.description: The parameters for the button widget. This is a JSON String.Example: {"text":"Button","alignmentX":"center","alignmentY":"center","fontSize":16}
The parameters for the container widget. This is a JSON String.Example: {"widgetStyle":{"backgroundColor":"#1295FF","borderEdges":[]}}

description.description: The description for the dynamic token.

label.description: The label for the dynamic token.

source.description: The source object of the dynamic token.

tokenName.description: The name of the dynamic token.

tokenSpec.description: The specification for the dynamic token.

type.description: The type of dynamic token. Valid values include query and insights.

initialValues.description: The initial values for the filter.

parameters.description: The parameters for the filter widget. This is a JSON String.Example: {"receiveFilterSource":{"filterMode":"all","widgetIds":[]},"filterOption":{"objectName":"Account","fieldName":"Account_Id","dataType":"Text","selectionType":"multiple"},"isLabelHidden":false}

source.description: The data source to apply the filter to.

parameters.description: The parameters for the image widget. This is a JSON String.

source.description: The data source the image is associated with.

parameters.description: The parameters for the filter widget. This is a JSON String.Example: {"metricOption":{"layout":{"componentVisibility":{"details":true,"title":true,"value":true,"comparison":true,"chart":true,"insights":false}},"sdmApiName":"AccountModel","sdmId":"2SMxx0000004CFUGA2"},"receiveFilterSource":{"filterMode":"all","widgetIds":[]}}

semanticModel.description: The semantic model the metric is associated with.

source.description: The data source the metric is associated with.

sourceDeprecated.description: Present if the data source the metric is associated with is deprecated.

version.description: The API version of the metric.

initialValues.description: The initial values for the parameters.

parameters.description: The parameters for the filter widget. This is a JSON String.Example: {"parameterName":"AccountParameter_prm","isLabelHidden":false}

source.description: The data source the parameters are associated with.

parameters.description: The parameters for the filter widget. This is a JSON String.Example: {"content":[{"attributes":{"color":"#000000","size":"12px"},"insert":"full dashboard"},{"attributes":{"align":"left"},"insert":"\n"}]}

analyticsVisualization.description: The API name of the visualization.

parameters.description: The parameters for the filter widget. This is a JSON String.Example: {"legendPosition":"Right","receiveFilterSource":{"filterMode":"all","widgetIds":[]}}

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:simpleType name="AnalyticsActionEventType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="click"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="select"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:simpleType name="AnalyticsActionType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="recordaction"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="flow"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="navigate"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="parameter"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="filter"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsAssetAction">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="actionType" type="tns:AnalyticsActionType"/>
    <xsd:element name="analyticsAssetVersion" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="eventType" type="tns:AnalyticsActionEventType"/>
    <xsd:element name="parameters" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="version" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:double"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsButtonWidgetDef">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="parameters" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsContainerWidgetDef">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="backgroundSource" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="parameters" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsDashPageWidget">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="analyticsDashboardWidget" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="colspan" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="column" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="row" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="rowspan" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsDashboard">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="analyticsWorkspace" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="backgroundSource" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="customConfig" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="lastDraftModifiedDate" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:dateTime"/>
        <xsd:element name="lastPublishedDate" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:dateTime"/>
        <xsd:element name="layouts" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsDashboardLayout"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="style" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="templateAssetSourceName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="templateSource" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="version" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:double"/>
        <xsd:element name="widgets" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsDashboardWidget"/>
        <xsd:element name="workspaceAssetRelationships" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsWorkspaceAsset"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsDashboardLayout">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="analyticsDashboard" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="analyticsDashboardVersion" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="columnCount" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="label" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="layoutName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="maxWidth" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="pages" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsDashboardPage"/>
    <xsd:element name="rowHeight" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="style" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="version" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:double"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsDashboardPage">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="index" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:int"/>
    <xsd:element name="label" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="pageName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="pageWidgets" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsDashPageWidget"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsDashboardWidget">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="analyticsDashboard" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="analyticsDashboardVersion" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="buttonWidgetDefs" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsButtonWidgetDef"/>
    <xsd:element name="containerWidgetDefs" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsContainerWidgetDef"/>
    <xsd:element name="dynamicTokens" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnlytDshbrdWdgtDynamicTkn"/>
    <xsd:element name="filterWidgetDefs" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsFilterWidgetDef"/>
    <xsd:element name="imageWidgetDefs" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsImageWidgetDef"/>
    <xsd:element name="label" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="metricWidgetDefs" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsMetricWidgetDef"/>
    <xsd:element name="parameterWidgetDefs" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsParamWidgetDef"/>
    <xsd:element name="textWidgetDefs" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsTextWidgetDef"/>
    <xsd:element name="type" type="tns:AnalyticsWidgetType"/>
    <xsd:element name="vizWidgetDefs" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsVizWidgetDef"/>
    <xsd:element name="widgetActions" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="tns:AnalyticsAssetAction"/>
    <xsd:element name="widgetName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:simpleType name="AnalyticsDynamicTokenType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="query"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="insights"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="reference"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="metric"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsFilterWidgetDef">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="initialValues" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="parameters" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="source" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsImageWidgetDef">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="parameters" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="source" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsMetricWidgetDef">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="parameters" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="semanticModel" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="source" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="sourceDeprecated" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="version" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:double"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsParamWidgetDef">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="initialValues" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="parameters" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="source" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsTextWidgetDef">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="parameters" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsVizWidgetDef">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="analyticsVisualization" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="analyticsVizVersion" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="parameters" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:simpleType name="AnalyticsWidgetType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="visualization"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="text"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="filter"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="parameter"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="button"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="metric"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="container"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="image"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="extension"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="summary"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnalyticsWorkspaceAsset">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="asset" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="assetType" type="tns:AnalyticsWorkspaceAssetType"/>
    <xsd:element name="assetUsageType" type="tns:AnalyticsWorkspaceAssetUsageType"/>
    <xsd:element name="metadataSourceType" minOccurs="0" type="tns:AnalyticsWorkspaceAssetMetadataSourceType"/>
    <xsd:element name="workspace" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:simpleType name="AnalyticsWorkspaceAssetMetadataSourceType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Promoted"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Reused"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:simpleType name="AnalyticsWorkspaceAssetType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="AnalyticsDashboard"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="AnalyticsVisualization"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="SemanticModel"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="MktDataModelObject"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="MktCalculatedInsightObject"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="MktDataLakeObject"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="MktDataConnection"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="MktDataTransformSetup"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:simpleType name="AnalyticsWorkspaceAssetUsageType">
  <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
    <xsd:enumeration value="Created"/>
    <xsd:enumeration value="Referenced"/>
  </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>
<xsd:complexType name="AnlytDshbrdWdgtDynamicTkn">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="description" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="label" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="source" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="tokenName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="tokenSpec" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
    <xsd:element name="type" minOccurs="0" type="tns:AnalyticsDynamicTokenType"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
```

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of an AnalyticsDashboard component.
declarative_metadata_sample_definition.code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<AnalyticsDashboard xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
    <analyticsWorkspace>My_Workspace</analyticsWorkspace>
    <description>A dashboard</description>
    <layouts>
        <analyticsDashboard>My_Dashboard</analyticsDashboard>
        <columnCount>36</columnCount>
        <layoutName>default</layoutName>
        <maxWidth>1200</maxWidth>
        <label>layoutLabel</label>
        <pages>
            <index>0</index>
            <label>Page 1</label>
            <pageName>e412bc11-d43b-4fba-ab44-b31bb842b49a</pageName>
            <pageWidgets>
                <analyticsDashboardWidget>visualization_1</analyticsDashboardWidget>
                <colspan>11</colspan>
                <column>1</column>
                <row>2</row>
                <rowspan>10</rowspan>
            </pageWidgets>
            <pageWidgets>
                <analyticsDashboardWidget>button_1</analyticsDashboardWidget>
                <colspan>9</colspan>
                <column>13</column>
                <row>8</row>
                <rowspan>2</rowspan>
            </pageWidgets>
            <pageWidgets>
                <analyticsDashboardWidget>container_1</analyticsDashboardWidget>
                <colspan>11</colspan>
                <column>23</column>
                <row>2</row>
                <rowspan>10</rowspan>
            </pageWidgets>
            <pageWidgets>
                <analyticsDashboardWidget>text_2</analyticsDashboardWidget>
                <colspan>9</colspan>
                <column>13</column>
                <row>5</row>
                <rowspan>2</rowspan>
            </pageWidgets>
            <pageWidgets>
                <analyticsDashboardWidget>metric_1</analyticsDashboardWidget>
                <colspan>11</colspan>
                <column>1</column>
                <row>13</row>
                <rowspan>10</rowspan>
            </pageWidgets>
            <pageWidgets>
                <analyticsDashboardWidget>list_4</analyticsDashboardWidget>
                <colspan>9</colspan>
                <column>13</column>
                <row>13</row>
                <rowspan>2</rowspan>
            </pageWidgets>
            <pageWidgets>
                <analyticsDashboardWidget>list_1</analyticsDashboardWidget>
                <colspan>9</colspan>
                <column>13</column>
                <row>2</row>
                <rowspan>2</rowspan>
            </pageWidgets>
        </pages>
        <rowHeight>24</rowHeight>
        <style>{"backgroundColor":"#ffffff","gutterColor":"#f3f3f3","cellSpacingX":8,"cellSpacingY":8}</style>
    </layouts>
    <masterLabel>My Dashboard</masterLabel>
    <style>{"widgetStyle":{"backgroundColor":"#ffffff","borderEdges":[],"borderColor":"#cccccc","borderWidth":1,"borderRadius":0}}</style>
    <version>64.0</version>
    <widgets>
        <analyticsDashboard>My_Dashboard</analyticsDashboard>
        <type>visualization</type>
        <vizWidgetDefs>
            <analyticsVisualization>New_Visualization</analyticsVisualization>
            <parameters>{"legendPosition":"Right","receiveFilterSource":{"filterMode":"all","widgetIds":[]}}</parameters>
        </vizWidgetDefs>
        <widgetName>visualization_1</widgetName>
    </widgets>
    <widgets>
        <analyticsDashboard>My_Dashboard</analyticsDashboard>
        <buttonWidgetDefs>
            <parameters>{"text":"Button","alignmentX":"center","alignmentY":"center","fontSize":16}</parameters>
        </buttonWidgetDefs>
        <type>button</type>
        <widgetActions>
            <actionType>navigate</actionType>
            <eventType>click</eventType>
            <parameters>{"destination":{"type":"url","target":"www.salesforce.com"}}</parameters>
            <version>63.0</version>
        </widgetActions>
        <widgetName>button_1</widgetName>
    </widgets>
    <widgets>
        <analyticsDashboard>My_Dashboard</analyticsDashboard>
        <containerWidgetDefs>
            <parameters>{"widgetStyle":{"backgroundColor":"#1295FF","borderEdges":[]}}</parameters>
        </containerWidgetDefs>
        <type>container</type>
        <widgetName>container_1</widgetName>
    </widgets>
    <widgets>
        <analyticsDashboard>My_Dashboard</analyticsDashboard>
        <textWidgetDefs>
            <parameters>{"content":[{"attributes":{"color":"#000000","size":"12px"},"insert":"full dashboard"},{"attributes":{"align":"left"},"insert":"\n"}]}</parameters>
        </textWidgetDefs>
        <type>text</type>
        <widgetName>text_2</widgetName>
    </widgets>
    <widgets>
        <analyticsDashboard>My_Dashboard</analyticsDashboard>
        <metricWidgetDefs>
            <parameters>{"metricOption":{"layout":{"componentVisibility":{"details":true,"title":true,"value":true,"comparison":true,"chart":true,"insights":false}},"sdmApiName":"AccountModel","sdmId":"2SMxx0000004CFUGA2"},"receiveFilterSource":{"filterMode":"all","widgetIds":[]}}</parameters>
            <source>AccountMetric_mtc</source>
        </metricWidgetDefs>
        <type>metric</type>
        <widgetName>metric_1</widgetName>
    </widgets>
    <widgets>
        <analyticsDashboard>My_Dashboard</analyticsDashboard>
        <filterWidgetDefs>
            <initialValues>null</initialValues>
            <parameters>{"receiveFilterSource":{"filterMode":"all","widgetIds":[]},"filterOption":{"objectName":"Account","fieldName":"Account_Id","dataType":"Text","selectionType":"multiple"},"isLabelHidden":false}</parameters>
            <source>AccountModel</source>
        </filterWidgetDefs>
        <label>Account Id</label>
        <type>filter</type>
        <widgetName>list_4</widgetName>
    </widgets>
    <widgets>
        <analyticsDashboard>My_Dashboard</analyticsDashboard>
        <label>AccountParameter</label>
        <parameterWidgetDefs>
            <initialValues>null</initialValues>
            <parameters>{"parameterName":"AccountParameter_prm","isLabelHidden":false}</parameters>
            <source>AccountModel</source>
        </parameterWidgetDefs>
        <type>parameter</type>
        <widgetName>list_1</widgetName>
    </widgets>
    <templateSource></templateSource>
    <templateAssetSourceName></templateAssetSourceName>
    <workspaceAssetRelationships>
        <asset xsi:nil="true"/>
        <assetType>AnalyticsDashboard</assetType>
        <assetUsageType>Created</assetUsageType>
        <workspace>My_Workspace</workspace>
    </workspaceAssetRelationships>
</AnalyticsDashboard>
